query: SELECT id, title, type, source, jurisdiction, summary, LENGTH(content) as content_length FROM documents WHERE title LIKE '%1/2023%' OR title LIKE '%menstruaci%' OR title LIKE '%menstruac%' OR content LIKE '%menstruaci%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qC6e8XA9uYDpdWY.4aab5d30693d --database DirVLPm6UeFJi3utFGbgZe --execute SELECT id, title, type, source, jurisdiction, summary, LENGTH(content) as content_length FROM documents WHERE title LIKE '%1/2023%' OR title LIKE '%menstruaci%' OR title LIKE '%menstruac%' OR content LIKE '%menstruaci%' LIMIT 10;

rows.title: Llei Orgànica 1/2023 - Menstruació incapacitant i situacions especials d'IT
rows.source: BOE - Agència Estatal Butlletí Oficial de l'Estat
